adopters.name: SignalPR
adopters.product_summary: AI-native PR execution platform for founders: real-time media event radar, newsjacking angle generation, journalist vector RAG matching, and outreach sync to Instantly, Smartlead, and Apollo.
adopters.soulos_role: Persistent agent layer via hybrid sidecar — episodic memory, persona state (HEXACO MSV), and hybrid prepare/complete orchestration alongside AWS Bedrock and pgvector semantic search.

adopters.name: Aeterna
adopters.product_summary: Interactive digital legacy platform: AI-guided life-story interviews, encrypted voice archives, family natural-language Q&A, and a digital twin that answers from the narrator's own recordings.
adopters.soulos_role: Persistent persona and episodic memory so narrator identity, tone, and recalled life facts stay consistent across interview sessions and family conversations.
